programs.title: Forged in Fire
programs.desc: Top bladesmiths from different walks of life compete to create the best weapons and prove their effectiveness in a series of daunting challenges.

actor: Grady Powell,J. Neilson,Doug Marcaida,David Baker,Ben Abbott

programs.title: Dark Marvels
programs.desc: Discover some of the lethal blades of history like the destructive Viking axe and the sacred katana that fell nations and forged empires.

programs.title: American Pickers
programs.desc: At an awesome Californian garage, Mike goes nuts over a retro boat and falls for a BMW micro-car that could be worth a lot of money.

programs.title: Shipping Wars
programs.desc: Shipping an iconic piece from a popular ghost movie has Roy at his wit's end. Meanwhile the Two Blondes take on a load of dinosaurs.

actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programs.title: Pawn Stars
programs.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell,Richard Harrison

programs.title: Kings of Restoration
programs.desc: Rick gets into preparation mode for a fast food face lift when a Big Mac Jail, belonging to a 1970s McDonald's PlayPlace set, arrives in the shop.
